name: Southern Praline Grits
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Enriched Hominy Quick Grits (Quaker or Aunt Jemima)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. In a large pot, bring water to a boil. Gradually stir in grits and salt until well combined.
4. Return the mixture to a boil; reduce heat to low.
5. Simmer for 2 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and let stand covered for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients (eggs, brown sugar, pecans, margarine/butter, cinnamon) until well mixed.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
9. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Garnish with whipped cream or pecan halves, if desired.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS PER SERVING:
Calories: 261
Carbohydrates: 40 g
Protein: 5 g
Fat: 9 g
Calcium: 34 mg
Sodium: 250 mg
Cholesterol: 90 mg
Dietary Fiber: 0 g
